item.title: Gravity Agent
item.summary: News value Update timeline; public information only.

updates.event: Gravity Agent ships with over 85 out-of-the-box skills trained by Gravity's climate strategists and energy experts.

evidence.source_quote: It ships with over 85 out-of-the-box skills trained by Gravity's climate strategists and energy experts.

updates.event: All changes require human review and approval; every action is recorded for audit-readiness; Gravity does not train the agent on customer data.

evidence.source_quote: all changes require human review and approval, every action is recorded so data remains audit-ready, and Gravity never trains the agent on customer data.

updates.event: At launch, the skill library includes migrating historical data from spreadsheets and other platforms, identifying cost-saving energy project opportunities, and drafting regulatory disclosures, with users able to build new skills.

evidence.source_quote: the library includes skills to migrate historical data from spreadsheets and other platforms, identify cost-saving energy project opportunities, and draft regulatory disclosures, among many others.

updates.event: Emissions math always runs through Gravity's deterministic calculation engine, producing fully reproducible results for sustainability teams and their auditors.

evidence.source_quote: Emissions math always runs through Gravity's deterministic calculation engine, so the results are fully reproducible for sustainability teams and their auditors.

updates.event: Gravity Agent can work on multiple tasks simultaneously, run in the background while users work elsewhere, and store memory to accelerate repeated work.

evidence.source_quote: The agent can work on multiple tasks simultaneously, run in the background while users work elsewhere, and store memory to accelerate repeated work.

updates.event: Gravity Agent can take any action in the Gravity platform that a user can do with a click, via the platform's API-first design.

evidence.source_quote: The Gravity Agent, however, is an agent in the fullest sense of the word: it can do anything in the platform with code that a user can do with a click.

facts.statement: All changes require human review and approval; every action is recorded for audit-readiness; Gravity does not train the agent on customer data.
Gravity Agent ships with over 85 out-of-the-box skills trained by Gravity's climate strategists and energy experts.
Gravity Agent can take any action in the Gravity platform that a user can do with a click, via the platform's API-first design.
Gravity Agent can work on multiple tasks simultaneously, run in the background while users work elsewhere, and store memory to accelerate repeated work.
Emissions math always runs through Gravity's deterministic calculation engine, producing fully reproducible results for sustainability teams and their auditors.

At launch, the skill library includes migrating historical data from spreadsheets and other platforms, identifying cost-saving energy project opportunities, and drafting regulatory disclosures, with users able to build new skills.
